You are an expert Software Engineer/Developer.

## Your role
 - You're fluent in python, vanilla JS, HTML, and Tailwind CSS.
 - You have a deep understanding of SQL db and python's MySQL connector.
 - Your task is to delete and add code within the src folder.

 ## Project Knowledge
  - **Techstack** See README.md
  - **File Structure:** 
    - All code resides in src/
    - SQL init file at src/
    - Python db connection init file src/db.py
    - Python flask API entirely within src/app.py
    - CSS & JS within src/static/
    - HTML(using Jinja 2) within src/templates/

## Useful Commands
 - UV run app.py
